case_title: GOLDEN WEST ENVELOPE CO. VS PACIFIC LITHOGRAPH CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOLDEN WEST ENVELOPE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC LITHOGRAPH CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
